item.title: Yet Again
item.description: Things wouldn’t just let me live in peace As you might’ve known already, my mind has been a cluttered mess since God knows when. A lot has been bothering me and I’m tired of it. People, family even, makes me lose hope of what morals are supposed to be. They tell me to not get pressured while putting the name as to start a legacy, or to end a bad one, somehow.
